operational_knowledge_units.title: Aveva API page exposes overall system control and state functions
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Aveva API page in the Overall System section presents system-level functions including System State, System Startup, System Bag Out, System Shutdown, and System Purge.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Overall System / Aveva API page'
Visible bullets list: 'System State', 'System Startup', 'System Bag Out', 'System Shutdown', 'System Purge'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Aveva API page overall system UI reference. The page includes system-level items System State, System Startup, System Bag Out, System Shutdown, and System Purge for OptiSweep overall system interaction.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System Startup stages AGVs for exchanges after shutdown charging state
operational_knowledge_units.summary: Between sorts, AGVs are kept in a shutdown state to charge. Invoking System Startup triggers OptiSweep to stage the AGVs for exchanges.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'AGVs are kept in a shut down state between sorts to allow them to charge.'
Bullet text: 'System startup triggers OptiSweep to stage the AGVs for exchanges.'

relationships.target: AGVs in shut down state between sorts

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System Startup behavior: AGVs are kept shut down between sorts so they can charge. System Startup triggers OptiSweep to stage AGVs for exchanges.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System Bag Out closes chutes and exchanges totes with items at sort end
operational_knowledge_units.summary: At the end of a sort, the close out process is used to close all chutes and exchange all totes that contain items.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'At the end of a sort the close out is used to close all chutes and exchange all totes with items.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System Bag Out operational behavior: at the end of a sort, close out closes all chutes and exchanges all totes with items.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System Shutdown places system into shutdown so AGVs can rotate on charger
operational_knowledge_units.summary: When the sort is complete, the system should be put into a shutdown state so AGVs can rotate on the charger.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'When the sort is done the system should be put in a shutdown state for AGVs to rotate on the charger.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System Shutdown behavior: when the sort is done, the system should be placed in shutdown state so AGVs can rotate on the charger.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System Purge exchanges all totes and suppresses tipper label printing
operational_knowledge_units.summary: System Purge exchanges all totes and does not print a label at the tipper.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'Exchanges all totes and does not print a label at the tipper.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System Purge behavior: exchanges all totes and does not print a label at the tipper.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System State shows the current system state
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The System State function displays the current state the system is in.
observed_evidence: Bullet text: 'Shows the current state the system is in'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System State on the Aveva API page shows the current state the system is in.
